description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The front facade includes large windows and a recessed entryway, while the side and rear elevations reveal a spacious terrace and outdoor living area. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with a mix of solid wall sections and generous glazing for natural light. The exterior is predominantly finished in light gray tones, with some darker accents around the windows and entry. Visible landscaping elements, such as potted plants, enhance the outdoor spaces. The overall layout suggests a contemporary urban residence with an emphasis on open, functional living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a spacious terrace, finished in light gray tones with clean, geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a partial overhang above the entrance.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the terrace, outdoor seating area, and potted plants along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the flat roof sections and the enclosed outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing secondary windows and a more private, solid wall section.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with large glass panels, minimal overhang, and no visible steps or porch
